analysis: The project appears to be a static website focused on black holes, with existing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The theme should be cosmic and dark, with animations related to black holes and animated objects. The CSS should include swirling effects, glowing elements, and a dark, cosmic aesthetic. The HTML should have a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon. The JavaScript should handle animations and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements are included.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for new buttons added in the HTML.
